Interface OpenApiMediaType

All Superinterfaces:
Node, Visitable
All Known Subinterfaces:
OpenApi30MediaType, OpenApi31MediaType, OpenApi32MediaType, OpenApi3xMediaType
All Known Implementing Classes:
OpenApi30MediaTypeImpl, OpenApi31MediaTypeImpl, OpenApi32MediaTypeImpl
public interface OpenApiMediaType extends Node
